masteries.name: Blade Disciple
masteries.description: ATK +75

masteries.name: Deadly Precision
masteries.description: C. RATE +5%

masteries.name: Heart of Glory
masteries.description: Increases damage inflicted by 5% when attacking with full HP

masteries.name: Keen Strike
masteries.description: C. DMG +10%

masteries.name: Shield Breaker
masteries.description: Increases damage inflicted to <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs on targets by 25%

masteries.name: Grim Resolve
masteries.description: Increases damage inflicted by 5% when attacking with 50% HP or less

masteries.name: Single Out
masteries.description: Increases damage inflicted to targets with less than 40% HP by 8%

masteries.name: Life Drinker
masteries.description: Heals by 5% of damage inflicted when attacking with 50% HP or less

masteries.name: Whirlwind of Death
masteries.description: Increases SPD by 6 for each enemy killed by this Champion. Stacks across each round in a battle, up to 18 SPD

masteries.name: Ruthless Ambush
masteries.description: Increases damage inflicted by 8% for the first hit on each enemy

masteries.name: Bring It Down
masteries.description: Increases damage inflicted by 6% when attacking targets with higher MAX HP

masteries.name: Wrath of the Slain
masteries.description: Increases damage inflicted by 5% for each dead ally. Stacks up to 10%

masteries.name: Cycle of Violence
masteries.description: Has a 30% chance of decreasing the cooldown of a random Skill by 1 turn if the damage inflicted by a Skill exceeds 30% of the target's MAX HP. Occurs once per turn

masteries.name: Opportunist
masteries.description: Increases damage inflicted to targets with <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuffs by 12%.

masteries.name: Methodical
masteries.description: Increases the damage inflicted by this Champion's default Skill by 2% each time it is used during battle. Stacks across each round in a battle, up to 10%

masteries.name: Kill Streak
masteries.description: Increases damage inflicted by 6% in Arena and Siege battles and 3% in all other locations for each enemy killed by this Champion in battle. Stacks across each Round in a battle, up to 12%

masteries.name: Blood Shield
masteries.description: Places a <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buff on this Champion for 1 turn when this Champion kills an enemy (except Boss' minions). The value of the <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> is equal to 15% of this Champion's MAX HP. Occurs once per turn

masteries.name: Stoked To Fury
masteries.description: Increases damage inflicted by 4% for each debuff on this Champion. Stacks up to 12%

masteries.name: Warmaster
masteries.description:
Has a 60% chance of inflicting bonus damage when attacking. Bonus damage is equal to 10% of the target Champion's MAX HP or 4% of the target's MAX HP when attacking Bosses. Bonus damage can only occur once per Skill and does not count as an extra hit.

Damage based on: <color=#1EE600FF>[Enemy MAX HP]</color>

masteries.name: Helmsmasher
masteries.description: Has a 50% chance of ignoring 25% of the target's DEF. For Skills that ignore DEF, this 25% is in addition to the amount ignored by the Skill.

masteries.name: Giant Slayer
masteries.description:
Has a 30% chance of inflicting bonus damage when attacking. Bonus damage is equal to 7.5% of the target Champion's MAX HP or 3% of the target's MAX HP when attacking Bosses. Bonus damage can occur on each hit of a Skill, but does not count as an extra hit.

Damage based on: <color=#1EE600FF>[Enemy MAX HP]</color>

masteries.name: Flawless Execution
masteries.description: C. DMG +20%

masteries.name: Tough Skin
masteries.description: DEF +75

masteries.name: Defiant
masteries.description: RES +10

masteries.name: Blastproof
masteries.description: Decreases damage received from AoE attacks by 5%

masteries.name: Rejuvenation
masteries.description: Increases the amount of healing and the value of <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs this Champion receives by 5%

masteries.name: Mighty Endurance
masteries.description: Decreases the damage received by 10% if this Champion has <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuffs.

masteries.name: Improved Parry
masteries.description: Decreases the damage received by this Champion by 8% when this Champion is hit with a critical hit

masteries.name: Shadow Heal
masteries.description: Heals this Champion by 6% of their MAX HP each time an enemy is healed. Occurs once per turn.

masteries.name: Resurgent
masteries.description: Has a 50% chance to remove 1 random debuff from this Champion when they lose 25% of their MAX HP or more from a single enemy Skill

masteries.name: Bloodthirst
masteries.description: Heals this Champion by 10% of their MAX HP when they kill an enemy target (except Boss' minions). Cooldown: 1 turn

masteries.name: Wisdom of Battle
masteries.description: Has a 30% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Block Debuffs]</color> buff on this Champion for 1 turn when <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuffs expire on this Champion.

masteries.name: Solidarity
masteries.description: Increases Ally RES by 5 for each buff placed on them by this Champion

masteries.name: Delay Death
masteries.description: Reduces the damage this Champion receives from a specific enemy by 0.75% with each hit taken from that enemy. Damage reduction stacks up to 6% for each enemy

masteries.name: Harvest Despair
masteries.description: Has a 60% chance of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Leech]</color> debuff for 1 turn when placing <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuffs.

masteries.name: Stubbornness
masteries.description: Increases RES by 10 for each debuff on this Champion. Stacks up to 30

masteries.name: Selfless Defender
masteries.description: Decreases the damage an ally receives from the first enemy hit in each round by 20%. This Champion will receive that damage instead

masteries.name: Cycle of Revenge
masteries.description: Has a 50% chance of increasing the Turn Meter by 15% when an ally is attacked with a critical hit. Will only increase the Turn Meter once if an ally receives multiple critical hits from a single Skill

masteries.name: Retribution
masteries.description: Has a 50% chance to counterattack when this Champion loses 25% of their MAX HP or more from a single enemy Skill

masteries.name: Deterrence
masteries.description: Has a 20% chance to counterattack an enemy when they apply a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuff on an ally. Cooldown: 1 turn

masteries.name: Iron Skin
masteries.description: DEF +200

masteries.name: Bulwark
masteries.description: Decreases the damage all allies receive by 5%. This Champion will receive that damage instead

masteries.name: Fearsome Presence
masteries.description: Increases the chances of placing a <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Sheep]</color> debuff from Skills or Artifacts by 5%

masteries.name: Unshakeable
masteries.description: RES +50

masteries.name: Steadfast
masteries.description: MAX HP +810

masteries.name: Pinpoint Accuracy
masteries.description: ACC +10

masteries.name: Lay On Hands
masteries.description: Increases the value of heals this Champion casts by 5%

masteries.name: Shieldbearer
masteries.description: Increases the value of <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs this Champion casts by 5%

masteries.name: Exalt in Death
masteries.description: Heals this Champion by 10% of their MAX HP the first time an enemy is killed in each round

masteries.name: Charged Focus
masteries.description: Increases ACC by 20 when this Champion has no Skills on cooldown

masteries.name: Healing Savior
masteries.description: Increases the amount of healing and the value of <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs placed by this Champion by 10% if the target ally has 40% HP or less

masteries.name: Rapid Response
masteries.description: Has a 30% chance of increasing the Turn Meter by 10% when a <color=#ffe87d>buff</color> cast by this Champion is removed or expires

masteries.name: Swarm Smiter
masteries.description: Increases ACC by 4 for each enemy alive. Stacks up to 16

masteries.name: Arcane Celerity
masteries.description: Has a 30% chance of increasing the Turn Meter by 10% when a <color=#ffe87d>debuff</color> cast by this Champion is removed or expires

masteries.name: Merciful Aid
masteries.description: Increases the amount of healing and the value of <color=#1ee600>[Shield]</color> buffs placed by this Champion by 15% if the target ally has <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color> debuffs

masteries.name: Cycle of Magic
masteries.description: Has a 5% chance of decreasing the cooldown of a random Skill by 1 turn at the start of every turn

masteries.name: Lore of Steel
masteries.description: Increases the Base Stat Set Bonuses of all Artifact Sets that increase Base Stats by 15%. This increase is multiplicative, not additive.

masteries.name: Evil Eye
masteries.description: Decreases the target's Turn Meter when this Champion hits them with the default Skill for the first time. Decreases the Turn Meter by 20% with single-target Skills and by 5% with AoE Skills. Occurs once per target.

masteries.name: Lasting Gifts
masteries.description:
Has a 30% chance to extend the duration of any buff cast by this Champion by 1 turn.

It will not extend <color=#1ee600>[Block Damage]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Unkillable]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Revive on Death]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Taunt]</color> buffs.

masteries.name: Spirit Haste
masteries.description: Increases SPD by 8 for each dead ally. Stacks up to 24

masteries.name: Sniper
masteries.description:
Increases the chances of placing any debuff from Skills or Artifacts by 5%.

It will not increase the chances of placing <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuffs.

masteries.name: Master Hexer
masteries.description: Has a 30% chance to extend the duration of any debuff cast by this Champion by 1 turn. It will not extend <color=#1ee600>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1ee600>[Bomb]</color>, or <color=#1ee600>[Petrification]</color> debuffs.

masteries.name: Elixir of Life
masteries.description: MAX HP +3,000

masteries.name: Timely Intervention
masteries.description: Increases this Champion's Turn Meter by 20% whenever an ally hero drops below 25% HP

masteries.name: Oppressor
masteries.description: Increases the Turn Meter fill rate by 2.5% for each active debuff cast by this Champion. Stacks up to 10%.

masteries.name: Eagle-Eye
masteries.description: ACC +50
